claim.observation: fls of the Users directory (inode 81647) on the partition at offset 1411072 lists the following entries: All Users, Default, Default User, Default.migrated, defaultprinter, desktop.ini, PC User, and Public.
claim.interpretation: The Users directory listing contains standard system/template profiles (All Users, Default, Default User, Public), a 'Default.migrated' directory (a name typically produced when the default profile is migrated during an OS upgrade/reinstall), and two named profile directories 'PC User' and 'defaultprinter'. These entries reflect profile directories present in the filesystem listing; on their own they do not indicate account ownership, who logged in, login activity, or any user action. The 'Default.migrated' entry is consistent with the in-place upgrade also indicated by the Windows.old directory.
